<!-- mount-div.qmd — copy this block into your .qmd at the place where you
     want the mermaid diagram to appear.

     1. Replace `arch-mount` with your mount-div ID (must match the key
        you used in dagDefs in diagrams.js).
     2. Replace the Figure caption + colour-key with your own.
     3. Make sure your qmd YAML includes the loader (see
        quarto-frontmatter.yaml in this template directory).
-->

## Architecture

<div id="arch-mount" style="min-height:520px;"></div>

<p class="figure-caption" style="text-align:center;font-style:italic;">
Figure 1: Project architecture. Node colours:
<span style="background:#4e9af1;color:#000;padding:0 6px;border-radius:3px;">IO / inputs</span>
<span style="background:#f17c4e;color:#000;padding:0 6px;border-radius:3px;">Engine / compute</span>
<span style="background:#a14ef1;color:#fff;padding:0 6px;border-radius:3px;">Regulation / IHT</span>
<span style="background:#4ef18a;color:#000;padding:0 6px;border-radius:3px;">Output / sink</span>.
Hover any node or arrow for a detailed description with source-code link.
Click any node to open the source file.
</p>
